working_on: Build-readiness gate protocol + universal expression contract widening + Phase 3 SQL gate exercise. Phase A: ADR 0039 + Layer 1/2/3 instantiation for SQL. Phase B: ADR 0040 + build-readiness-gate.md. Phase C: build_readiness/phase_3_sql.md + ADR 0031 amendment + TENSION_VOCABULARY.md + supabase/ → product/seed-graph/migrations/ move + backup tag. Phase D: STATE/ROADMAP/ENGINE_LOG updates. Output: S-0028 inherits a fully-resolved decision set for Phase 3 SQL build.
outcome_summary: S-0027 closed. Phase A landed ADR 0039 (universal expression contract widening Python-only Layer 1/2/3 to all AI authoring patterns), expression-contract-instantiation.md (per-pattern table with TBD rows for TS/YAML/shell/outward), migration-discipline.md (Layer 1 source-of-truth for SQL/migrations row), validate_sql_gates() with four gates (transaction wrap, CASCADE on FKs to users(id), RLS-enable on public.* CREATE TABLE, CHECK on enum-modeled TEXT columns) plus 18 new pytest tests, pre-commit SQL-gates branch, session-shutdown-sequence cold-review extended to .sql. Phase B landed ADR 0040 (build-readiness gate before substantive build sessions — halt on absence-or-unresolved-Tier-1), build-readiness-gate.md procedure + report template, session-build-lifecycle step 5 (read report at boot), engine/build_readiness/ directory + README, CLAUDE.md Topical pointers. Phase C dogfooded the gate against Phase 3 SQL: produced engine/build_readiness/phase_3_sql.md (T1-A through E resolved, T2-A through H documented as concrete SQL-ready answers, T3-A through G named as deferred), authored product/seed-graph/migrations/TENSION_VOCABULARY.md (v1 enum vocabularies for tension_log.exchange_summary JSONB fields per ADR 0026 sub-decision (1) deferral), amended ADR 0031 Consequences pinning local public.users-mirror cascade shape, git mv supabase/migrations/{PREDICATE_MANIFEST,ROUTING}.md to product/seed-graph/migrations/ (settling the Phase 3 migration directory location decision), removed empty supabase/ placeholder, added graph_version increment contract to ROUTING.md, cut backup tag pre-phase-3-v0.0.1 at S-0026 close commit (36b0907) and pushed. Phase D updated STATE.md (S-0027 close + S-0028 next-session work item gated by phase_3_sql.md + ADR count 38→40 + 7 engine + 33 product + backup-tags row extended), ROADMAP.md (Phase 2 extended with build-readiness gate machinery + Phase 3 annotated as gated + success criteria expanded with users-mirror table + Tier 2 reference), ENGINE_LOG.md [Unreleased] (S-0027 Added: ADR 0039, ADR 0040, expression-contract-instantiation, migration-discipline, build-readiness-gate, build_readiness/ + README + phase_3_sql, TENSION_VOCABULARY, 18 pytest tests, backup tag; S-0027 Changed: validate.py SQL-gates surface, pre-commit SQL branch, session-shutdown cold-review widening + ENGINE_LOG migration-version note, session-build-lifecycle boot step 5, ADR 0031 cascade pin, supabase→product/seed-graph move, engine/adr/README, CLAUDE.md, ROADMAP). Cold-review pass per ADR 0038 Layer 3 on the Python diff (validate.py + test_validate.py): matches contract, no premise drift detected; the four SQL gates operationalize migration-discipline.md mechanical checks correctly; the 18-test SQL-gates test suite covers each gate path plus CLI dispatch. SQL cold-review branch did not fire (no .sql files modified in this session — only Markdown moves under product/seed-graph/migrations/). Validator clean: 11 checks, 0 hard-fails, 0 soft-warns. Pytest 56/56 passing. Ruff + mypy --strict clean across engine/tools/. Five commits total: eager-claim + Phase A + Phase B + Phase C + Phase D. The boundary between project setup and project build sits between S-0027 and S-0028. S-0028 boots into a fully-resolved decision set for Phase 3 SQL build, gated by engine/build_readiness/phase_3_sql.md per ADR 0040.
